overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai warrior exploring a burning Japanese temple complex during golden hour. The character walks along a dirt path past autumn maple trees, enters a traditional wooden temple, navigates through paper-screen interior halls, and exits into an open courtyard with rising smoke from distant fires.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple approach path with burning forest backdrop

events.description: approaching the main temple entrance from the exterior path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the temple entrance, passing wooden fences with fire visible beyond the autumn trees

entered.detail: tall wooden fence running along the right side of the path
forest fire with orange flames visible beyond the temple walls
thick black smoke rising from the burning forest
trees with bright orange autumn foliage lining the path
large traditional wooden temple building with curved roof tiles
traditional stone lantern ornament beside the path

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks along a dirt path bordered by a wooden fence, approaching a traditional Japanese temple. Autumn maple trees with orange leaves frame the scene while black smoke rises from a forest fire burning in the distance beyond the temple walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple interior with tatami mats and paper screens

events.description: entering the temple building from the exterior path
approaching the temple exit, interior shadows transition to bright exterior golden light

agents.ego_description: entering the temple and walking through the dimly lit interior halls with tatami flooring, passing wooden pillars and paper screens

notable_agents.action: villager standing near the far exit of the temple hall

entered.detail: large wooden entrance gate with ornate curved roof
thick wooden support pillars lining the interior
woven straw mat flooring covering the temple interior
translucent paper sliding doors with wooden frames
traditional paper lanterns suspended from the ceiling beams

segments.scene_description: The character enters the temple through a large wooden archway into dimly lit interior halls. The space features tatami mat flooring, wooden pillars, and paper screen walls. A villager stands near the far exit as the character approaches the brighter light of the exterior courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard with auxiliary shrine buildings

events.description: exiting the temple into the open courtyard
approaching the burning village area with increased smoke and fire visibility

agents.ego_description: exiting the temple into the courtyard and continuing toward the burning village in the distance

notable_agents.action: villager walking alongside the character toward the courtyard

entered.detail: open stone-paved courtyard area between temple buildings
smaller traditional wooden structures flanking the main courtyard
thick black smoke rising from the burning village ahead
village structures engulfed in flames visible in the distance
stone tile pathway leading through the courtyard

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the temple into a wide courtyard, the samurai continues toward a burning village in the distance. Auxiliary shrine buildings line the sides of the stone-paved courtyard while thick black smoke rises from structures ahead, and a villager walks alongside the character.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene autumn path through the dim interior of a temple and out into a war-torn courtyard. It begins with the samurai walking along a dirt path bordered by a wooden fence and orange maple trees, while black smoke from a distant forest fire looms over the horizon. As the character passes through a large wooden archway, the scene shifts into the muted light of interior halls featuring tatami mats, wooden pillars, and paper screen walls. The camera then follows the samurai toward a brightening exit where a villager stands, before emerging from the temple into a wide, stone-paved courtyard. The shot finally expands to reveal auxiliary shrines lining the path as the character advances toward a burning village engulfed in thick black smoke.
